holdings.infoBox: DEEF is an equity ETF with a total of 1264 individual holdings. The top holdings are Tesco stock at 0.98%, MSCI EAFE Index Future June 26 at 0.83%, Magna International at 0.78%, RWE Aktiengesellschaft at 0.66%, and ACS, Actividades de Construcción y Servicios at 0.62%.

overview.description: The Xtrackers FTSE Developed ex US Multifactor ETF (DEEF) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund selects and weights securities within the FTSE Developed ex-US index by five different factors. DEEF was launched on Nov 24, 2015 and is issued by Xtrackers.
